source_conflict.summary: Official and aggregate status signals are aligned.

official.summary: Epic Games Statuspage API: All Systems Operational

updates.title: Epic Games Statuspage API: All Systems Operational
Rocket League Matchmaking Issues
updates.meta: Resolved / Critical / Resolved / This incident has been resolved.

updates.title: Rocket League Matchmaking Issues
updates.meta: Investigating / Critical / Resolved / We’re aware of reports of matchmaking issues in Rocket League. Our team is currently investigating and we’ll provide an update as soon as we have a fix.

updates.title: Matchmaking Issues
updates.meta: Resolved / Major / Resolved / Matchmaking services have been restored.

updates.title: Matchmaking Issues
updates.meta: Investigating / Major / Resolved / We’re currently investigating an issue affecting matchmaking services in the Middle East region. Users may experience longer queue times or difficulty finding matches. We'll provide updates as more information becomes available.

updates.title: Login Service Outage
updates.meta: Resolved / None / Resolved / ✅ We've resolved an issue affecting Fortnite, Rocket League, Fall Guys and Epic Online Services logins. We're continuing to monitor services to ensure everything remains stable.

updates.title: EOS Analytics in DevPortal
updates.meta: Resolved / None / Resolved / Some EOS analytics were not available in the DevPortal from Feb 25th 3:18 PM to Feb 26th 7:25 AM EST.

updates.title: Fall Guys Item Shop Purchases Error
updates.meta: Resolved / Minor / Resolved / This incident has been resolved.

updates.title: Fall Guys Item Shop Purchases Error
updates.meta: Investigating / Minor / Resolved / Players on Xbox may see purchases fail when using the Item Shop in game.

updates.title: Fab Marketplace Product Detail Page Issues
updates.meta: Resolved / Critical / Resolved / This incident has been resolved.

outage.summary: Epic Games Statuspage reports All Systems Operational. No active incidents are listed.
